plugins.name: zchat
plugins.description: IRC channel for Claude Code — reply, join, dm, broadcast via slash commands

plugins.name: dev-loop-skills
plugins.description: AI-driven development pipeline — 7 skills for test-driven dev loop (bootstrap, plan, write, run, evaluate). v0.2: Skill 1 ships with self-update.sh for drift detection + 3-layer self-evolution (check / refresh / rebootstrap).

plugins.name: prd2impl
plugins.description: PRD-to-Implementation pipeline — 14 skills for planning, task generation, parallel batch dispatch, and milestone verification. Per-scope plans_dir isolation for parallel milestones. v0.5.0: PRD-entry × superpowers bridge — skill-1 Phase 0.5 ambiguity detection via superpowers:brainstorming; skill-4 Step 4.5 per-task plan generation via superpowers:writing-plans, every task gains source_plan_path → Entry A tasks auto-flow through plan-passthrough.
